message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 6 goals for the model.
Setting up the three participants first. Building Authority is expanded (main process owner). Citizen and Environmental Agency are external and modeled as collapsed pools for clear message exchanges.

I’ll now model the full Building Authority process end-to-end inside the existing lanes, using message flows to the collapsed Citizen and Environmental Agency pools (including the 14-day deadline via an event-based gateway).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 6 issue(s) — details below.
